label: Arb Scanner
description: Live odds grid and arb opportunity stream with minimum arb threshold filter and one-click trade.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary present in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["sports-trading"]. 0.3 availableOn=["sports"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No direct mock imports in widget file. 0.6 No async loading path (pure mock+WebSocket architecture — synchronous data, no isLoading surface). 0.7 Empty state handled by ArbGrid and ArbStream sub-components. 0.8 No error path in context (mock-only). 0.9 No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useSportsData() — no inline fetch. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() and uses organizationIds. 1.3 Org filter gates bets (hasSportsDesk check); fixtures are venue-wide public events, not org-scoped — domain-correct. 1.4 N/A — sports fixtures have no client-level scope. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter not applicable to sports. 1.6 Empty organizationIds returns all data. 1.7 ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS/DEFAULT_ARB_THRESHOLD remain in lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures (config constants used by arb-tab trading component; acceptable scope).
